requirement_topic.en: INTI Mandatory Product Certification — Electrical Safety for Air Conditioners and Heat Pump Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: INTI强制产品认证——空调器与热泵电器电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: INTI強制產品認證——空調器與熱泵電器電氣安全

summary.en: Argentina's mandatory product certification scheme, administered by INTI (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología Industrial) under Res. SICyM 92/98 and subsequent updates, requires that listed electrical goods — including household and similar air conditioners and heat-pump appliances — bear the Certificado de Homologación (type-approval certificate) before import or sale. Products must be tested to the applicable IRAM standard (IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 for heat-pump and air-conditioning appliances) at an INTI-recognised or INTI-accredited laboratory. The certificate holder (typically the importer or local representative) carries the ongoing market-surveillance obligations. Chinese CCC certificates are not accepted as equivalent evidence under the INTI scheme.
summary.zh: 阿根廷强制产品认证制度由INTI（国家工业技术研究院）依据Res. SICyM 92/98及后续更新主管，要求列入目录的电器——包括家用和类似用途空调器及热泵电器——在进口或销售前持有Certificado de Homologación（型式批准证书）。产品须在INTI认可或INTI认证的实验室按适用IRAM标准（热泵和空调电器适用IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40）检测。证书持有人（通常为进口商或当地代理）承担持续的市场监督义务。中国CCC证书在INTI制度下不被视为等效证据。
summary.zht: 阿根廷強制產品認證制度由INTI（國家工業技術研究院）依據Res. SICyM 92/98及後續更新主管，要求列入目錄的電器——包括家用和類似用途空調器及熱泵電器——在進口或銷售前持有Certificado de Homologación（型式批准證書）。產品須在INTI認可或INTI認證的實驗室按適用IRAM標準（熱泵和空調電器適用IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40）檢測。證書持有人（通常為進口商或當地代理）承擔持續的市場監督義務。中國CCC證書在INTI制度下不被視為等效證據。

standards_or_laws: Res. SICyM 92/98 (mandatory certification of listed electrical goods, Argentina)
IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — heat pumps, air conditioners, dehumidifiers)

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme, administered by CNCA, mandates certification and GB-standard compliance for household air conditioners and heat pumps (GB 4706.32, GB 17625). CCC certificates and Chinese factory records constitute domestic-market compliance evidence only and are not recognised by INTI for Argentine market access.
summary.zh: 中国CCC（强制性产品认证）制度由认监委主管，要求家用空调器和热泵获得认证并符合GB标准（GB 4706.32、GB 17625）。CCC证书和中国工厂记录仅构成国内市场合规证据，不被INTI认可用于阿根廷市场准入。
summary.zht: 中國CCC（強制性產品認證）制度由認監委主管，要求家用空調器和熱泵獲得認證並符合GB標準（GB 4706.32、GB 17625）。CCC證書和中國工廠記錄僅構成國內市場合規證據，不被INTI認可用於阿根廷市場准入。

gap.en: CCC does not substitute INTI certification. Chinese exporters must support the Argentine importer or local representative with IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 test reports from an INTI-recognised laboratory, technical documentation, and product samples as required for type-approval. Ongoing compliance with INTI market-surveillance requirements (periodic testing, incident reporting, label accuracy) falls on the certificate holder in Argentina.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代INTI认证。中国出口商须协助阿根廷进口商或当地代理提供INTI认可实验室出具的IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40测试报告、技术文件及型式批准所需的产品样品。INTI市场监督要求（定期检测、事故报告、标签准确性）的持续合规义务由阿根廷证书持有人承担。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代INTI認證。中國出口商須協助阿根廷進口商或當地代理提供INTI認可實驗室出具的IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40測試報告、技術文件及型式批准所需的產品樣品。INTI市場監督要求（定期檢測、事故報告、標籤準確性）的持續合規義務由阿根廷證書持有人承擔。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for listed electrical goods imported or sold in Argentina under Res. SICyM 92/98
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable domestic-market products under CCC; not equivalent to INTI certification

source.publisher: INTI (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología Industrial), Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — INTI mandatory certification under IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 is required for Argentine market entry; CCC evidence does not substitute and separate testing and type-approval via an INTI-recognised laboratory is necessary.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——进入阿根廷市场须取得基于IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40的INTI强制认证；CCC证据不能替代，须通过INTI认可实验室进行单独检测和型式批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——進入阿根廷市場須取得基於IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40的INTI強制認證；CCC證據不能替代，須通過INTI認可實驗室進行單獨檢測和型式批准。
